meta.title: Studio
meta.description: A studio of senior RevOps experts who embed within your teams to operate from the inside.
hero.subtitle: We are not a traditional agency. We are <bold>a studio of senior experts</bold> who embed within your teams to operate from the inside.
hero.quote: "We join your Slacks, your rituals, and we build the system alongside you."
model.title: The Ocobo Studio™ model
model.subtitle: The traditional agency is often too slow and too far from the reality on the ground. We designed a pragmatic alternative to truly scale.

model.cards.title: Embedded Squad

model.cards.title: 100% Impact
model.cards.description: No lengthy theoretical reports. We deliver ready-to-use system building blocks.

model.cards.title: Zero Junior
model.cards.description: On every account, only senior profiles who have already scaled leading companies.
